message:
fix(codegen): Migrate power_div_ops.zig to builder API

Migrates arithmetic operators to use auto-close helpers:
- emitBinaryCall now uses withParensCtx for guaranteed bracket matching
- emitExprBoolCoerced uses emitParens for coercion wrapping
- genPowOp, genDivOp, genFloorDivOp, genModOp use nested withParensCtx
- genSimpleBinOp uses withParensCtx for all bracket patterns
- emitBinOp used for simple binary operations (bool bitwise ops)

This makes bracket mismatches impossible through auto-closing callbacks.
